title: BIS/DOB-wide legacy source research (scope bound by M1-T007 owner connector directives)
objective: Research the DOB-wide legacy source families exactly as bounded by project-control/reports/M1-T007-owner-connector-directives.md section 6 - including bf97-mjsy (DOB Incident Database source; NEVER call it BIS), g76y-dcqj, and 855j-jady - applying sections 2-5 (connector model, parsers, staged priority, channel-coverage labeling). Verify current dataset identifiers, schemas, update cadence, auth/rate limits, and limitations against official sources; produce a research document with retrieval dates and a connector recommendation. Research only - no connector implementation
business_reason: Handoff queue item 4: next parallel research slot; feeds M2 risk-fact stage per the owner connector directives
inputs: project-control/reports/M1-T007-owner-connector-directives.md (BINDING scope: section 6 source list incl. bf97-mjsy [DOB Incident Database source - NEVER call it BIS], g76y-dcqj, 855j-jady; sections 2-5 connector model, parsers, staged priority, channel-coverage labeling)
docs/research/ existing DOB NOW research (M1-T007) and source-research conventions from M1-T001/T003/T004 (official URL + retrieval date + fixture-grade evidence, no schema guessing)
data.cityofnewyork.us Socrata catalog (tokenless access verified as standing environment fact); nyc.gov api-portal is 403-walled - do not rely on it
outputs: docs/research/dob-legacy-sources.md: per-source family - official dataset identity, current schema/field inventory with observed sample evidence, update cadence, auth/rate limits, null/quirk semantics, channel-coverage labeling per directive section 5, staged connector priority recommendation per section 4, explicit limitations
Small representative response fixtures ONLY if KB-scale and needed as evidence (no bulk downloads - low-storage policy)
allowed_paths: services/api/tests/fixtures/** (KB-scale representative fixtures only, if needed)
acceptance_scenarios: S1 every source family in directive section 6 has: verified current dataset ID, row-count/date-range observation, field inventory from a REAL sampled response (not documentation alone), retrieval timestamps
S2 bf97-mjsy is described per the owner C1v2 disposition (documented secondary/future source feeding the M2 risk-fact stage) and never labeled BIS
S3 rate-limit/auth behavior observed or officially documented with citation; tokenless throttling noted
S4 channel-coverage labeling per directive section 5 applied to every source; gaps and overlaps with DOB NOW explicit
S5 staged priority recommendation per section 4 with rationale tied to M2 needs
S6 negative case: at least one candidate dataset examined and rejected with reason (no padding the source list)
S7 no schema guessed anywhere - every field claim traces to a sampled response or official data dictionary; fixtures KB-scale; no bulk data on owner PC
risks: No file/reviewer overlap with Wave 1 (docs/research + fixtures only); must not delay Wave 1 gate dispatches (owner condition on the parallel slot)
Live Socrata sampling is read-only and tokenless; if throttled, degrade to documented evidence and record the limitation
